### 💰 Revenue — Q3 2026 Target: ₱5.6M FMS Revenue/month
| Metric | Mar 2026 Actual | Q3 2026 Target | Gap |
|---|---|---|---|
| FMS Revenue/month | ₱1.17M | ₱5.6M | ₱4.43M |
| Gross Revenue/month | ₱4.69M | ~₱12.4M | ₱7.71M |
| FMS Take Rate | ~25% | 45% (Rio events) | +20pp |
| Conversion Rate | ~10% | ~80% (Phase 2) | +70pp |
| Events/month | ~16 | 25+ | +9 |

**Rating: 🔴 OFF TRACK** (but structurally planned)
Evidence: Currently at ₱1.17M vs ₱5.6M target — a 4.8x gap. However, this is not a surprise. The entire revenue strategy is staged through Rio Phase 1 → Phase 2. The real test is whether the phase gates execute on time:
- **Phase 1** (Day 1 post-signing): All RunRio photographers on FMS exclusively. Conversion 10% → ~20%. FMS take: 25%.
- **Phase 2** (Jul/Aug 2026): Prepay integration live. Conversion → ~80%. FMS take: 45%.
- **Prepay integration** hasn't been scoped by Tim yet. This is the most critical untracked risk.
- **Baseline revenue per event** calculation due Apr 30 — not done yet.

**Key sub-OKRs:**
- [ ] Onboard all RunRio + Spartan SEA events → 🔒 Blocked on Rio signing
- [ ] Secure 2+ additional exclusive organizer partnerships → ❌ No progress tracked
- [ ] Calculate baseline avg revenue per event (Apr 30) → ⏳ Pending
- [ ] Tim scopes + ships prepay integration → ❌ Not scoped yet

## 🎯 Overall OKR Confidence: **38%**

The strategy is sound. The execution is in a critical window. Rio signing in 6 days is make-or-break for the entire Q3 plan. Everything else — SEA, team build, revenue 4.8x — cascades from that one event.

**The danger isn't that the plan is bad. It's that 100% of the plan rests on one person signing one document.**

## 💡 Top Actions (Next 7 Days)

### 1. Confirm or contingency-plan Rio by April 16 (Wednesday)
Don't wait until April 19 to find out. Van should check in with Rio now — tone, any hesitations, timeline. If there's any doubt, activate Dave and prepare Plan B in writing. The absence of a documented Plan B right now is a real risk.

### 2. Get Tim to scope prepay integration this week
This is the critical path to ₱5.6M/month. Even if Rio signs on the 19th, Phase 2 (Jul/Aug) will slip if Tim doesn't start scoping now. Push for a rough estimate: what does it take, how long, what needs to be built? One meeting this week prevents a Q3 miss.
